name: mechanicist-factorio
title: Mechanicist Factorio
author: mrcalzon
description: A grim industrial retheme and expansion for Factorio, translating the base game's machinery, logistics, research, and armored doctrine into a Mechanicus-inspired manufactorum war economy. Includes stronger tanks, revised vehicle systems, required Informatron and Factory Planner support, plus compatibility hooks for Space Age, Quality, and Mechanicus-themed mods.
